title: FourJaw
subtitle: Set UX and product direction for an industrial SaaS platform operating under delivery pressure and competing stakeholder priorities.
bullets: Moved the team from reactive UI requests to a repeatable decision framework
Aligned product, engineering, and commercial stakeholders around shared priorities
Restructured core journeys and information flow to reduce avoidable friction
result: Improved decision velocity, clearer product direction, and stronger cross-team confidence.

title: SoloProtect
subtitle: Led UX and full-stack delivery for geolocation-led lone-worker monitoring and incident-response interfaces.
bullets: Designed supervisor and operations journeys for map-based device monitoring
Led a new geolocation service experience across individual and fleet oversight
Built production interfaces from prototype to handoff in Azure DevOps workflows
result: Faster monitoring decisions and clearer incident-response visibility for operational teams.

title: Databowl
subtitle: Redesigned onboarding and lead flow architecture across a lead-generation platform connected to a Lead Management System.
bullets: Mapped fragmented acquisition-to-lead-management journeys into one coherent flow
Reframed content and interaction patterns around user intent and progression
Reduced ambiguity between quote funnels, lead-management touchpoints, and next actions
result: A clearer multi-touchpoint journey that improved usability for users and operators.
